75566.subject: ⚠️ Ваше сховище Google One заповнено на 89%
75566.body:
Дізнайтеся, що станеться, коли сховище буде заповнено

͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏




Ваше сховище заповнено на 89‍%



Використано 89 ГБ 100 ГБ



Ви використали 89 ГБ із 100 ГБ сховища в межах тарифного плану Google One.  
Коли вільне місце закінчиться, Ви не зможете:



надсилати й отримувати електронні листи в Gmail;




автоматично завантажувати нові фото й відео в Google Фото;




завантажувати нові файли на Google Диск;




редагувати й створювати файли в Google Документах, Таблицях, Презентаціях,  
Формах тощо.




Ви можете керувати сховищем, зокрема:



•


звільнити місце, видаливши великі або непотрібні файли за допомогою  
менеджера сховища Google One;



•


отримати додатковий обсяг сховища, оновивши свій тарифний план Google One.



Якщо Ви вже вирішили проблему, не зважайте на цей лист.



Маєте запитання?

Відвідайте Довідковий центр ›




Чи була інформація в цьому
листі корисна?




Щасливе обличчя

Нейтральне обличчя

Сумне обличчя





Ми надіслали Вам це обов'язкове службове сповіщення, щоб повідомити важливу  
інформацію про Ваш обліковий запис Google.









© 2026 Google Ireland Ltd,
Gordon House, Barrow Street,
Dublin 4, Ireland. © 2026 Google Ireland Ltd, Gordon House, Barrow Street,  
Dublin 4, Ireland.

75562.subject: Vitalik Outlines a 'Lean Ethereum' Protocol Overhaul
75562.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Vitalik](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/vitalik-buterin-outlines-lean-ethereum-roadmap-a-three-to-four-year-protocol-overhaul)**[ outlines a 'Lean Ethereum' roadmap](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/vitalik-buterin-outlines-lean-ethereum-roadmap-a-three-to-four-year-protocol-overhaul)

* **[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-sells-3-588-bitcoin-for-216m-to-fund-dividend-payments)**[ sells 3,588 BTC, first sale under $1.25B program](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strategy-sells-3-588-bitcoin-for-216m-to-fund-dividend-payments)

* **[Ripple](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/ripple-secures-full-mica-license-completing-eu-compliance)**[ secures a full MiCA license](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/ripple-secures-full-mica-license-completing-eu-compliance)

* **[Inside DTCC's Move to Stellar](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/dtcc-stellar-tokenization-dtc-custodied-assets-explainer)**[ (Partner)](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/dtcc-stellar-tokenization-dtc-custodied-assets-explainer)

* **[JPMorgan](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/jpmorgan-s-jltxx-tokenized-money-market-fund-aum-grows-250-in-a-month-on-ethereum)**['s tokenized MMF grows AUM 250% in a month ](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/jpmorgan-s-jltxx-tokenized-money-market-fund-aum-grows-250-in-a-month-on-ethereum)

* **[BonkDAO](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/bonkdao-treasury-drained-of-20m-via-malicious-proposal)**['s treasury is drained of $20M](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/bonkdao-treasury-drained-of-20m-via-malicious-proposal)

* **[Cosmos Labs Acquires Mintscan and Team](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/cosmos-labs-acquires-mintscan-cosmos-korea-expansion)**[ (Partner)](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/cosmos-labs-acquires-mintscan-cosmos-korea-expansion)

Vitalik Buterin wants to rebuild Ethereum's core one more time. Over the weekend he laid out "Lean Ethereum," a three-to-four-year overhaul he framed as the network's third major protocol iteration since the 2022 Merge.

The plan pushes a multi-year simplification of the base protocol, aimed at keeping Ethereum's core small and verifiable as scaling moves to layer-2s. The pitch bets that Ethereum's edge is durability: a base layer simple enough to stay stable and outlast competitors while execution scales on L2s. 

**Read more below!**

Caption:

## Strategy's $1.2B Bitcoin Sale Is... a Rounding Error?

With Strategy now actually selling — 3,588 BTC for $216M today — the question is whether it moves the market. **Scott Melker** [do

75554.subject: The world’s most liveable cities in 2026
75554.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ6ro7Eyx1vtyRVAYk9LgmQQCi2zjDHiEJiTf8hH-_WEgtlkthkysOk3XCh1IYFFhcL7l4myA2oqEEPmQkcPvMlIj_FS1HndSUgDBjM 

July 6th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ7WuHdCYKIicSB9uKeY2QEJfbZc35ZnS3RKwax9sBxWz5CU8q5HKu8kypddqBPCF7iz7k5fDSsf-dm1KFt7oHLh9egZLagNFt4_5mh 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ8bn8T5GR6hla55fiVQA8vfovhwwyPrZjaYENT7NJfmFUSd3wTKhpBQQHrK72SmElklrPxieiFiU1cPZ0kOva47oov5LufdbsqoPGH 


 


 
 

Stephanie Studer

Senior digital editor



 For some people, this city had it all: good schools, little rain, low or no taxes—and safety. Then came the Iran war. In the latest liveable-cities ranking by EIU, our sister organisation, the city has fallen four places (any guesses?). The index ranks 173 cities from most to least liveable. 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ9AY_b6bdAJyhe504PtgSIfsz7ZGJPGVRSzeF4DUx_ughi3am6B9ybzukTCQD7bNPRJbuO7F7Pp8Ymr_M80KiMMdrPvxmJE7U 
This year’s winner 
 has a lot more wet weather, but everything else going for it.


 Elsewhere: 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ-_O7dJIKtSR5Q94DkLw1tUlZebSefX72-GMaTqcZBcRlIwSirAQLg_XUNtnH3rmmEk67h05_vZpFZ7AZjjQCH6E

75552.subject: 📰 AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 6
75552.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-6-oleh-bezuhlyi-dx2kf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BxjCMbxLzSuir2FGx53lQIQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3UgvbTZvfbxYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr9f318b~jz-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr9f318b-jz
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Strategy's first-ever Bitcoin sale to fund dividends rattled an already-jittery market, dragging BTC below $62K — yet fresh MiCA licenses, a Solana ETF filing and a $19B miner-to-AI pivot kept institutional momentum firmly alive. 🔴 Strategy Sells 3,588 BTC for $216M — Its Largest Sale Ever Michael Saylor's Strategy dramatically accelerated its Bitcoin disposals, offloading 3,588 BTC (~$216M) last week to replenish dollar reserves for preferred-stock dividends. It was the firm's first meaningful sale since building its never-sell identity, and it landed alongside a reported $8.3B Q2 unrealized loss, pushing BTC below $62,000. Read full story 🇪🇺 Ripple Wins Full MiCA Authorization Across Europe Luxembourg's CSSF upgraded Ripple's preliminary crypto-asset provider license to fully compliant, making it one of the few firms fully MiCA-authorized for payments and institutional services across all 30 European Economic Area countries. More details 🏛️ SEC Closes Consensys Ethereum 2.0 Probe Consensys said the SEC has closed its investigation into Ethereum 2.0 without recommending enforcement action, lifting a long-standing regulatory cloud over ETH staking and removing a major overhang for the network. Read more 🚨 Summer.fi Halts Lazy Summer Vaults After $6M Exploit DeFi protocol Summer.fi paused its Lazy Summer vaults following a roughly $6 million exploit, with its SUMR token falling more than 18% in the aftermath as the team assessed the damage. See details 📈 VanEck Files for Spot Solana ETF A VanEck-linked proposal reached the SEC via a Cboe BZX rule filing, formally putting Solana into the U.S. spot ETF conversation and pushing the altcoin fund race beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum. Read full story 🏢 TeraWulf Signs $19B Anthropic Data Center Lease Bitcoin miner TeraWulf's stock surged double digits after signing a 20-year lease with AI firm Anthropic at its Kentucky site — expected to deliver 401 MW of IT load and generate roughly $19 billion in revenue, underscoring the miner-to-AI infrastructure pivot. More details ⚙️ Vitalik Reveals Ethereum's Biggest Rebuild Since The Merge Vitalik Buterin detailed a revised "Lean Ethereum" roadmap that would replace nearly every major part of the protocol, moving quantum resistance and privacy up the priority list. It lands as ether rallies more than 12% over the past wee
